title: Nephrotic syndrome in children - NHS
text:
child will need dialysis. Dialysis is where a machine replicates kidney function, from an early age until they can receive a kidney transplant.
A person only needs 1 kidney to survive, so a living person can donate a kidney. Ideally, this should be a close relative.
Find out more about kidney transplants
